_comment: v4rian vault/* read-only lockdown. Vault branches are the archival home of every merged pool branch — the canonical proof of what shipped, captured at the SHA that merged into dev. Any mutation of a vault ref breaks the historical record. Pins vault/* creation to the claim workflow's identity (the repo's github-actions[bot] using the default GITHUB_TOKEN) since that workflow's archive step is the only legitimate creator, and blocks update + deletion entirely so the archived tip cannot be amended, rebased, force-pushed, or deleted by anyone (including admins on the org). The include patterns cover both layouts: legacy flat refs/heads/vault/<suffix> (pre-pool/n44) and current refs/heads/vault/<vYYYY.MAIN>/<suffix> (since pool/n44 introduced the major-prefix classification). Apply via .io.v4rian.how-git/bin/lockdown or scripts/apply-repo-rules.sh. The ACTOR_ID placeholder is substituted at apply time with the integration id of the GitHub Actions bot on the target repo (gh api /orgs/{org}/installations --jq '.installations[] | select(.app_slug=="github-actions") | .id').
name: v4rian-vault-readonly
